name: Plain & Simple Corn Bread (Gluten-free)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the flours in a large bowl.
2. Gradually add hot water to the flour mixture and stir thoroughly until combined.
3. Pour the batter into a lightly oiled or non-stick round or square cake pan.
4. Bake at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for 50-60 minutes.
